heroHeadline: 526 Settlers Storm Al-Aqsa on Independence Day; Palestinian Shot Dead in Deir Dibwan as Settler Wave Continues
heroSubtitle: 526 Israeli settlers stormed the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound on Israel's 78th Independence Day under police escort, raising flags and performing rituals inside. One Palestinian was shot dead by settlers in Deir Dibwan east of Ramallah — one day after settlers killed a 14-year-old student and a 32-year-old man at al-Mughayyir Boys School. Hamas formally rejected the US Board of Peace disarmament proposal in Cairo talks. Five major NGOs declared the Gaza ceasefire 'failing' at the six-month mark.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
